mapper.select:
SELECT ot.onboarding_template_id AS template_id, ot.name, ot.description, ot.status, ot.template_kind, ot.department_type_code, ot.level, ot.created_at, ot.updated_at, CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT ct.checklist_template_id) AS INT) AS checklist_count, CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT tt.task_template_id) AS INT) AS task_count, CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT oi.company_id) AS INT) AS used_by_company_count FROM onboarding_templates ot LEFT JOIN checklist_templates ct ON ct.onboarding_template_id = ot.onboarding_template_id AND COALESCE(ct.status, '') != 'DELETED' LEFT JOIN task_templates tt ON tt.checklist_template_id = ct.checklist_template_id AND COALESCE(tt.status, '') != 'DELETED' LEFT JOIN onboarding_instances oi ON oi.onboarding_template_id = ot.onboarding_template_id WHERE
GROUP BY ot.onboarding_template_id, ot.name, ot.description, ot.status, ot.template_kind, ot.department_type_code, ot.level, ot.created_at, ot.updated_at ORDER BY ot.updated_at DESC, ot.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM onboarding_templates ot WHERE

SELECT ot.onboarding_template_id AS template_id, ot.name, ot.description, ot.status, ot.template_kind, ot.department_type_code, ot.level, ot.created_by, ot.created_at, ot.updated_at, CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT ct.checklist_template_id) AS INT) AS checklist_count, CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT tt.task_template_id) AS INT) AS task_count, CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT oi.company_id) AS INT) AS used_by_company_count FROM onboarding_templates ot LEFT JOIN checklist_templates ct ON ct.onboarding_template_id = ot.onboarding_template_id AND COALESCE(ct.status, '') != 'DELETED' LEFT JOIN task_templates tt ON tt.checklist_template_id = ct.checklist_template_id AND COALESCE(tt.status, '') != 'DELETED' LEFT JOIN onboarding_instances oi ON oi.onboarding_template_id = ot.onboarding_template_id WHERE ot.level = 'PLATFORM' AND ot.company_id = #{platformCompanyId} AND ot.onboarding_template_id = #{templateId} GROUP BY ot.onboarding_template_id, ot.name, ot.description, ot.status, ot.template_kind, ot.department_type_code, ot.level, ot.created_by, ot.created_at, ot.updated_at

SELECT ct.checklist_template_id, ct.name, ct.stage, ct.deadline_days, ct.sort_order, ct.status, ct.created_at, ct.updated_at FROM checklist_templates ct WHERE ct.company_id = #{platformCompanyId} AND ct.onboarding_template_id = #{templateId} AND COALESCE(ct.status, '') != 'DELETED' ORDER BY ct.sort_order ASC, ct.created_at ASC

SELECT ct.checklist_template_id, tt.task_template_id, tt.title, tt.description, tt.owner_type, tt.owner_ref_id, tt.due_days_offset, tt.require_ack, tt.require_doc, tt.requires_manager_approval, tt.approver_user_id, tt.sort_order, tt.status FROM task_templates tt INNER JOIN checklist_templates ct ON ct.checklist_template_id = tt.checklist_template_id WHERE tt.company_id = #{platformCompanyId} AND ct.company_id = #{platformCompanyId} AND ct.onboarding_template_id = #{templateId} AND COALESCE(tt.status, '') != 'DELETED' AND COALESCE(ct.status, '') != 'DELETED' ORDER BY ct.sort_order ASC, tt.sort_order ASC, tt.created_at ASC
